candidates.row_label: Cash flw from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: Despite malformed wording, the values reconcile to net cash from operating activities after working capital changes; best match for operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow target.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flw from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: Selected the line whose values match net cash from operating activities; the label appears concatenated with the next section header but is still identifiable as CFO.
